name: Healthie
description: API-first practice-management and EHR infrastructure for digital health builders, offering scheduling, charting, billing and messaging APIs.

seo.title: Healthie — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Healthie: API-first practice-management and EHR infrastructure for digital health builders, offering scheduling, charting, billing and messaging APIs.

when_to_use: API-first EHR and scheduling infrastructure for digital health
Telehealth appointment booking and charting for health startups
Billing and insurance claim management for care delivery apps
Building patient engagement apps on a HIPAA-compliant backend
Connected device data integration for remote patient monitoring

review.verdict: The default API-first practice-management backend for digital health startups in the US.
review.best_for: US digital health startups needing EHR, scheduling, and billing APIs
review.not_for: Non-US healthcare products or tiny solo-practitioner tools

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Monthly subscription; downgradable next cycle, no explicit peak-lock.
